notes: Game loads with rendered scene in background, but menu which should be overlaid, is invisible. Eventually crashes to desktop
title: Gatling Gears

notes: Game starts. The menu background is a real time scene rendered in-engine. That works perfectly in all its complexity. But the menu is completely invisible so I can't actually start the game. I'm sure the 3D part of this game works just fine, but it's completely unusable as long as the 2D overlay is invisible. None of the 3 Proton launch options have any effect.
title: Gatling Gears
